title: Skill text: scout/capture/keep-current paragraphs for commands record
action: Three short additions, one per owning skill, each with a CREATION-LOG note citing docs/09 as the baseline evidence (bee-writing-skills discipline). bee-hive Session Scout: after bee_status, if commands.verify is recorded run the baseline check before any cell is claimed; red baseline = surface + fix-first tiny cell (per D2); scout contract table notes commands come free in the preamble. bee-exploring: on first contact with a repo whose config lacks commands, ask the user for setup/start/test/verify during scoping and write them to .bee/config.json (per D4) — one paragraph, not a new phase. bee-scribing reference: commands are a Pointers-level fact — when a synced change alters how the project is built/run/verified, update .bee/config.json commands in the same sync.

truths: Each addition is a single tight paragraph in the owning skill; no new sections, no duplicated mechanism text
key_links: all three paragraphs cite .bee/config.json commands as the single record — no second location introduced
prohibitions: No mechanism description duplicated from AGENTS block verbatim

verify: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const checks=[['skills/bee-hive/SKILL.md','commands.verify'],['skills/bee-exploring/SKILL.md','commands'],['skills/bee-scribing/references/scribing-reference.md','config.json']];let fail=0;for(const [f,s] of checks){const t=fs.readFileSync(f,'utf8');if(!t.includes(s)){console.error('MISSING '+s+' in '+f);fail=1}}process.exit(fail)"

trace.outcome: One tight paragraph per owning skill: hive Session Scout baseline gate, exploring Scope commands capture (skippable, never invented), scribing merge-rule keep-current; CREATION-LOG amendments with doc-09 baseline evidence and pressure scenarios. SKILL.md line counts stay under 200 (150/94).
